# DOCX Skill

## Capabilities

- Create new Word documents from scratch
- Read and extract content from existing .docx files
- Edit and modify document structure, styles, and content
- Work with templates, headers, footers, and comments
- XML-level document manipulation via pandoc and docx-js

## Subdirectories

- `scripts/` - Helper scripts for document operations

## Dependencies

- pandoc - Document conversion
- python-docx or docx-js - Programmatic document manipulation
